summary: Comprehensive testing of CalmTails Best Sellers, Promotions system, and Loyalty rewards features. All 20 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/products/bestsellers returns 8 products sorted by review_count (descending: 423, 389, 356, 312, 312, ...)
Backend: /api/promotions returns 4 active promotions (WELCOME15, FREESHIP50, PAWS10, SPRING25)
Backend: All promotions have correct discount_type, discount_value, min_purchase values
Frontend: Homepage loads with WELCOME15 promo banner visible at top
Frontend: Best Sellers section displays 4 products with 'Top Rated' badge
Frontend: Best Sellers first product shows '#1 Best Seller' badge
Frontend: CalmTails Rewards loyalty banner displays points info (1pt/$1, 100pts=$5 Off, 4 Tiers)
Frontend: Join Free button visible in loyalty banner
Frontend: New Arrivals section displays 4 products with Add buttons
Frontend: 8 category icons display correctly (Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets, Calming Beds, Supplements)
Frontend: Products page has 7 pet type filter buttons (Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets, Reptiles)
Frontend: All filter buttons are clickable and visible
seed_data_creation: 39 products across 8 pet types + 4 promotions (WELCOME15, FREESHIP50, PAWS10, SPRING25) + Loyalty tiers (bronze, silver, gold, platinum)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Best Sellers and Promotions features fully implemented and tested. Backend has 39 products across 8 pet types. /api/products/bestsellers returns 8 products sorted by review_count desc. /api/promotions returns 4 active promotion codes. Promotion validation works correctly with min_purchase requirements. Loyalty endpoints (/api/loyalty/status, /api/loyalty/redeem) require authentication. Frontend displays Best Sellers section with 4 products, CalmTails Rewards loyalty banner with points/tier info, and all 8 category icons. Product filter buttons for all 7 pet types work correctly.

frontend_sections.loyalty_banner: Points info and Join Free button
frontend_sections.categories: 8 icons (Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets, Calming Beds, Supplements)
